name: Team Gillum
subject: Will you be watching this week's debate?
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f6/9e00690/595a9b38/2402c8d6/2402128810/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&source=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett")
Friends,

Andrew loves sharing his vision for Florida on the debate stage -- it's a chance for voters in every corner of the state to hear from him directly about how we make this state work better for all of us.

So we want to make sure you're tuning in this Wednesday evening at 7:00 p.m., as Andrew debates his opponents in Ft. Myers at Florida Gulf Coast University.
[HOST A DEBATE WATCH PARTY](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f6/9e00690/595a9b38/2402c8e9/2402128810/VEsE/ "http://events.andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=2+-+HOST+A+DEBATE+WATCH+PARTY&utm_campaign=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&source=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett#zipcode=&distance=50&sort=time&f%5B%5D=debate-watch-party")
[COMMIT TO TUNING IN](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f6/9e00690/595a9b38/2402c8e8/2402128810/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/commit-to-holding-a-watch-pary?gpsid=13_55_2091&source=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_campaign=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=3+-+COMMIT+TO+TUNING+IN")
[DEBATE RALLY RSVP](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f6/9e00690/595a9b38/2402c8eb/2402128810/VEsC/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/event/detail/rally/wrvd?gpsid=13_55_2091&source=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_campaign=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=4+-+DEBATE+RALLY+RSVP")
The debate will be aired in Southwest Florida on WINK-TV and will be streamed online at winknews.com.

If you'll be in Ft. Myers, [**RSVP for our pre-debate rally with Andrew!**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37f6/9e00690/595a9b38/2402c8ea/2402128810/VEsD/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/event/detail/rally/wrvd?gpsid=13_55_2091&source=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_campaign=em18_180716_debate_fnd_gq_act_debate_TG_ett&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=5+-+RSVP+for+our+predebate+rally+with+Andrew") We'll be at the Cohen Center at 4:30 pm. 11090 FGCU Blvd., Fort Myers, FL 33965-6565.

This is a big moment for our campaign -- so make sure you tune in and show your support by using #GillumForGovernor during the debate!

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

name: ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: DeVos is back in PA -- time to take a stand:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e608a/51dbcc2a/1a8bd2ec/3a7f960/3200594413/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") President Trump's special interest cabinet is in Pennsylvania today, team.

Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos visited the Erie School District this afternoon, pushing her reckless agenda right in our backyard.

**_[Our students need leaders who stand up to the Trump administration. Send DeVos a message -- donate $5 or more to protect Bob Casey today.](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Betsy DeVos publicly supports policies that undermine our public school system. She oversaw rollbacks of protections for students with disabilities and of reforms that protect victims of sexual assault. She explicitly directed her school safety commission to not study the role of guns. At every turn, DeVos has shown that she stands with special interests, not with students and teachers. Americans deserve better from our Department of Education.

While Republican elites like DeVos have spent years trying to dismantle the public school system, Bob Casey has spent his career in the Senate fighting to give all children access to a quality education. Bob is one of the loudest critics of Secretary DeVos and all of President Trump's unqualified, corporate nominees, so the GOP is targeting him this year. They would love nothing more than to replace Bob with a rubber-stamp Republican who will help Trump and DeVos push dangerous policies at students' expense.

**Betsy DeVos will continue to push the GOP's disastrous agenda, hurting our kids where it matters most: the classroom. We need Senators who stand up for what's right -- can you donate $5 or more to support Bob Casey?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180716_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Pres. Trump's meeting with Putin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
President Trump met with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Helsinki today -- and instead of taking Putin to task for interfering in our 2016 elections, he embraced Putin and abandoned our nation's i |
---

| | Peter,

President Trump met with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Helsinki today -- and instead of taking Putin to task for interfering in our 2016 elections, he embraced Putin and abandoned our nation's intelligence community.

When given the chance to stand up for our security interests, President Trump denied the consensus of our intelligence community, including Director of National Intelligence and former Indiana Senator Dan Coats, that Russia attempted to influence the 2016 election. Standing next to Vladimir Putin, he blamed the United States instead.

As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I'm extremely disappointed by what happened today in Helsinki. It was a blow to America's national security. Now Russia may be empowered to interfere in our elections once again -- and we cannot allow that.

I want to hear from you, Peter. **What did you think of President Trump 's meeting with Putin?** | | [**It was a setback for our national security**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e80/7377f838/3d8c5b44/51f9e9a0/4167772499/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/putin-meeting")
---

[**It was a positive development**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e80/7377f838/3d8c5b44/51f9e9a0/4167772499/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/putin-meeting")
Thanks,
Joe

|

Dear Peter, There are certain things that are a public trust. Schools. Hospitals. Jails. The core responsibilities of government. Functions performed on behalf of us all. If you make these functions for-profit, the results become distorted. Instead of achieving what is best for society, the programs serve financial interests. We saw that this weekend, when **[the Associated Press announced that the detention of immigrant children is a billon dollar business](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1662674/8861022/-399669116?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTczYTY4Mi1iZjg5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6IElGMeJm3g2Lm4fSuUXsFLQGLo7ObKGKxb2AJMS5A=)**. These businesses, in essence, are profiting from child abuse. **I cannot think of a more clear example of why we need to get money out of politics**. Unfortunately, the Supreme Court has ruled that corporations are "persons" with constitutional rights. In the Citizens United case, the Court said corporations have a "free speech" right to spend unlimited money on political campaigns. This decision must be overturned. **We know that the introduction of a profit motive leads to campaign contributions, and that money will influence government policy.** Immigrant detention, in particular, has been distorted by profit-seeking. Two-thirds of all jailed immigrants are held in for-profit facilities. And private jailers donate tens of millions of dollars to political candidates. **My general election opponent, Rep. Michael McCaul, has received at least $15,000 from jailers profiting from immigrant detention**, including Correction Corporation of America (now "CoreCivic") and The Geo Group. In his capacity as Chairman of Homeland Security, **[McCaul advocates to fill more beds](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1662675/8861023/158454927?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTczYTY4Mi1iZjg5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6IElGMeJm3g2Lm4fSuUXsFLQGLo7ObKGKxb2AJMS5A=) **in immigrant detention centers. There is a direct line between the money he receives and the policies he creates. **By contrast, I have committed to not accept any corporate PAC donations**. I want to be accountable to you, to the voters of the Texas 10th congressional district -- not to whoever decides to write a big check. **[Two-thirds of Americans oppose family separation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1662676/8861024/-2084655956?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTczYTY4Mi1iZjg5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6IElGMeJm3g2Lm4fSuUXsFLQGLo7ObKGKxb2AJMS5A=)** , but somehow the Administration continues the policy anyway. This must change. **We** **must hold elected officials accountable when they put private profit before the public good**. When the representatives refuse to listen to the people, it's the job of the people to choose new representatives. **Join our work to take back government for the people**. **[Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1662677/8861025/481931398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTczYTY4Mi1iZjg5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6IElGMeJm3g2Lm4fSuUXsFLQGLo7ObKGKxb2AJMS5A=)** or [_**donate**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1662678/8861026/2079582211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTczYTY4Mi1iZjg5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6IElGMeJm3g2Lm4fSuUXsFLQGLo7ObKGKxb2AJMS5A=&am=20) today. Thank you, Mike

name: The White House
subject: Bold American diplomacy in Finland
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b87d37a3f70368a0115fab5c890b96bd4245f3b98bc601f1ebf8817560d91fa56d76a4be8c4c59b26e5a3ebca6fbeb1c38

The White House - July 17, 2018

The Day Ahead

President Donald J. Trump will meet with members of Congress to discuss options for further tax reform to help working Americans.

Bold American diplomacy in Finland

When President Trump met with Russian President Vladimir Putin yesterday, he continued a proud American tradition on the world stage. “From the earliest days of our republic, American leaders have understood that diplomacy and engagement is preferable to conflict and hostility,” the President said.

America has no illusions when it comes to Russia. President Trump directly addressed the issue of Russian interference in U.S. elections with President Putin, and the Trump Administration has implemented a
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b84e069eda26631c0bb4152da81176182ac95a60df73503254b513a3cd9e6b58e783ca2f328477d27dfb9dc9c060ec51d0
range of tough sanctions on Russian individuals and entities. “The disagreements between our two countries are well known,” President Trump said. “But if we're going to solve many of the problems facing our world, then we're going to have to find ways to cooperate.”

The bottom line: Americans want peace, not conflict. “Nothing would be easier politically than to refuse to meet, to refuse to engage, but that would not accomplish anything. As president, I cannot make decisions on foreign policy in a futile effort to appease partisan critics,” President Trump said.

“As the world’s two largest nuclear powers, we must get along!” President Trump tweeted.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b85cd66f18b33b59ccb9183cae988aa5280f2e31f7660da5dbb55a7ebe74e7a925778c66cdea28f20b0f9ec3e0cfbcdd5a
Watch President Trump’s press conference with President Putin.

Sen. Rand Paul:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b81a1b199d169374e7082339cda8da4bf9436c7da76dd3b00767e2bf1cccda98f13c0371a19d4abb071e4cd21c373e7493
President Trump was right. America needs fewer enemies.

The First Lady’s trip to Europe

First Lady Melania Trump accompanied President Trump to Europe last week, helping the President to build lasting relationships with America’s allies.

In Belgium, the First Lady took part in the official spousal program of the NATO summit. “It was an opportunity for us to come together in an exchange of ideas, and appreciate the unique cultural traits of Belgium,” she said.

In the United Kingdom, the First Lady visited the Royal Hospital Chelsea, where she joined Philip May—husband of British Prime Minister Theresa May—and local schoolchildren in making symbols of remembrance for fallen soldiers. “It is always an honor to meet with soldiers who have dedicated a life of service to their country,” the First Lady said.

Read more about the First Lady’s trips to
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b89c717771a7cea7c00207b56fd4316a92fcf027eee6a70237cf8ec0a439774268218d36e68e2a9b6803e8893b5e41f15a
Belgium and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b86c573769cb2cadd222682f879fc4d0581811d5b2478baf61d24079d45d27386324adf5fa911dbc0b687ad378e327234c
England .

In photos:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b80f90194ee9cc6d8562ee1a38477f889ccd748297587f9773027874ed77981a37350b3f4c5764b6771db0094fae3b50d4
See more from the President and First Lady’s trip to Europe.

Photo of the Day

Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks

President Donald J. Trump and President Vladimir Putin of the Russian Federation
| July 16, 2018

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b8a1c0029210ee884a3e8fe065cf6aa4838d673df39a4ed2feb40c556c40d127fe270188609077c2ffaa3abe34b9fc9814
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f07bb84a06e637b8a12f381e9187d95e75249f3af1b2adff6a07c7affa834a3da4416e2f550ace3fab1c2848dd60fe2adc1815e6d17203e0
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a10a36a1b17fdfe9cd002fc441ebdb05952b6c4bbb5129732fe94578c634943372cca307db028710964c20513fbe56334ae7c45b5ec45834

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben=20Carollo?=
subject: Were you as shocked as I was?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
I was shocked to hear that President Trump stood by Putin over our intelligence community on the issue of Russian hacking in our elections.

I was shocked when I heard what Trump said yesterday.

At a time when our nation is concerned for the wellbeing of our democracy, Trump stood firm in denying that there was any concern at all. We need to be confident that our election systems are safe from foreign attackers and that our leadership will stand tall in defending our nation. As a veteran, I am deeply concerned about what is going on in the White House and in Congress.

We need real leadership that will stand up to defend our democracy, and we need people who are willing to put pressure on the White House to respond to the threat of hacking in our elections. Trump needs to be held accountable for standing by Putin over the United States intelligence community.

We need your help to send a message to Washington that we will not stand for politicians who are complacent in the security of our democracy. clean_body: I was shocked to hear that President Trump stood by Putin over our intelligence community on the issue of Russian hacking in our elections. I was shocked when I heard what Trump said yesterday. At a time when our nation is concerned for the wellbeing of our democracy, Trump stood firm in denying that there was any concern at all. We need to be confident that our election systems are safe from foreign attackers and that our leadership will stand tall in defending our nation. As a veteran, I am deeply concerned about what is going on in the White House and in Congress. We need real leadership that will stand up to defend our democracy, and we need people who are willing to put pressure on the White House to respond to the threat of hacking in our elections. Trump needs to be held accountable for standing by Putin over the United States intelligence community. We need your help to send a message to Washington that we will not stand for politicians who are complacent in the security of our democracy. Donate () today to support a candidate who will fight to defend our country and the future of our democracy. Peter,

We're less than a month away from the primary election and our LAST primary Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline is tomorrow!

Polling by The Mellman Group shows that despite the Republican lean of Kansas' 2nd District, Paul leads the pack -- and this deadline is our chance to show everyone just how strong we are going into the general election.

**[Can we count on you to chip in $5 or more and help us file a strong fundraising report?](https://act.myngp.com/el/5a89JXXMqk2cAJh0KarGur2x1KqgV-gV-tyG78zIdgY=/8Cfcuu0cKA3JHwsrzuRbOdZNx6Ql5WmZTCvdIf78-a4=?gpsid=13_36_2102&refcode=em18_180717_FEC1_fnd_gq_ful_pri_SK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_FEC1_fnd_gq_ful_pri_SK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: Protect our public schools
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lvMyghVTMLHb6P_HJEG0RI1Y5rUUXmEhVeKu0rEa06s=/KxoCS0nILUfmAKTiUt5caD-9XHo7Db8OuOJT5P3jFow=?utm_campaign=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sisolak&ms=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&refcode=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS)
---

Hello --

Our schools are the most important building block in the lives of Nevada children.

Both of my daughters attended public high school in Nevada, and both received degrees from the University of Nevada, Las Vegas. I even served two terms as a Regent for the Nevada System of Higher Education. We're a public school family, born and bred.

That's why it's so frustrating to see leaders in Washington advocate to divert desperately needed public school funding to private schools. I'm fighting back against this attack on our children's education -- and I need you with me, now.

**[Add your name now to support fully funding our public schools.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lvMyghVTMLHb6P_HJEG0RI1Y5rUUXmEhVeKu0rEa06s=/KxoCS0nILUfmAKTiUt5caD-9XHo7Db8OuOJT5P3jFow=?utm_campaign=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sisolak&ms=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&refcode=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS)**

I am proud to say that I was recently endorsed by the Clark County Education Association teachers' union because they know how much this issue means to me. I'll continue to fight to raise teacher salaries, decrease classroom sizes, and make higher education more affordable -- because every student in Nevada should have the opportunity to succeed.

**[Join the fight. Put pressure on our leaders to fully fund our public schools and add your name now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/lvMyghVTMLHb6P_HJEG0RI1Y5rUUXmEhVeKu0rEa06s=/KxoCS0nILUfmAKTiUt5caD-9XHo7Db8OuOJT5P3jFow=?utm_campaign=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sisolak&ms=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&refcode=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS)**

Thank you,

Steve Sisolak

[Add your name](https://act.myngp.com/el/lvMyghVTMLHb6P_HJEG0RI1Y5rUUXmEhVeKu0rEa06s=/KxoCS0nILUfmAKTiUt5caD-9XHo7Db8OuOJT5P3jFow=?utm_campaign=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sisolak&ms=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS&refcode=em18_recurrsend_welcomeseries3_adv_gq_ful__SS)

name: Tim Ryan
subject: The best birthday present
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
In lieu of birthday cake, ice cream, or any other gift, I'm going to ask you a quick favor: Earlier this year, I took a group of venture capitalists from New York and San Francisco on a bus tour of fi
Folks,

Thank you so much for your birthday wishes! It's incredible to hear from so many wonderful people all over the country, old friends and new.

**In lieu of birthday cake, ice cream, or any other gift, I'm going to ask you a quick favor: **

Earlier this year, **[I took a group of venture capitalists from New York and San Francisco on a bus tour of five cities in the Midwest.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a922c/5486deaa/2996609e/dcc5ec3/2998707845/VEsH/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180717_bdayty&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+I+took+a+group+of+venture+capitalists+fr&utm_campaign=em20180717_bdayty") **

I believe there is so much opportunity for investment in "comeback cities" like Cleveland, Youngstown, Flint, Detroit, and South Bend. It's a win-win: lower costs for companies, more jobs and opportunity for folks in the Heartland.

**The "Comeback Cities Tour" was a runaway success -- and has already resulted in millions of dollars invested in communities that are too often overlooked. **

**[Can you please watch our first short video from the Comeback Cities Tour, then share it with your friends on Facebook and Twitter?](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a922c/5486deaa/2996609e/dcc5ec2/2998707845/VEsE/ "https://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/comeback-cities?source=em20180717_bdayty&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+please+watch+our+first+short+vid&utm_campaign=em20180717_bdayty")**

I'm really proud of what we've been able to accomplish -- stay tuned for more "comeback" updates!

Thanks again for your birthday wishes, and all the best,

\-- Tim

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
337 Vienna Avenue, Suite 1
Niles, Ohio 44446
If you'd no longer like to receive emails, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a922c/5486deaa/2996609e/dcc5ec5/2998707845/VEsF/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+UNSUBSCRIBE&utm_campaign=em20180717_bdayty&source=em20180717_bdayty")

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Putin Puppet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=helsinki_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Friend -- Yesterday, Donald Trump stood next to Vladimir Putin and refused to acknowledge that Russia interfered in our 2016 elections to put Trump in office. His despicable display proved what we have known all along: **Trump is a puppet of Putin and is unfit to hold office.** **** Fortunately, the Constitution provided us a way to deal with elected officials who we suspect has committed treason: U.S. Constitution Art. 2, Sec. 4 _"The President, Vice President and all Civil Officers of the United States, shall be removed from Office on Impeachment for, and Conviction of, Treason, Bribery, or other high Crimes and Misdemeanors."_ Richard wants to fight to remove trump while **Tina Smith wants to play nice**. Listen to this statement from Smith last week: https://twitter.com/RWPUSA/status/1009937682338910208https://twitter.com/RWPUSA/status/1009937682338910208https://twitter.com/RWPUSA/status/1009937682338910208 Smith believes that we should not even _talk_ about impeachment because "there are parts of Minnesota that still support the President". **This is unacceptable.** When he gets to Washington, Richard will immediately call upon the leaders of the House and Senate to initiate Congressional investigations into Trump, his family, and his political cronies. If they uncover evidence of high crimes and misdemeanors, Richard will call for **impeachment proceedings to begin immediately**. We cannot allow our highest office to be run from Moscow while our President slanders our allies and glad-hands tinpot dictators. Can you contribute today and Richard take one more step towards Washington? [](http://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=helsinki_fundraiser&n=2 "Join the fight!") Thank you,

Painter For Minnesota

name: Kimberly Padilla
subject: Wow! You're amazing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Yesterday, Sherrod told you that we came in short of our mid-month goal. This morning, I ran the numbers and you stepped up in a big way. The good news is we only need $7,000 more to close the gap. The bad news is we only have until midnight to do it. [**Will you rush in $26? name: Hailey Barringer
subject: I wish I had better news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Hi there, team. I'm Hailey, Kathy's communications director. It's my job to help Kathy amplify her message to families across the 13th District. I'm here to help people know why Kathy is the right choice to represent hard-working North Carolinians of this district in Congress. We can't let Congressman Ted Budd beat us to a single voter. We have to be there when it counts and show them what's possible with Kathy leading this energized, grassroots team! I wish I had better news to deliver for my first message to you, but unfortunately, I have to tell you that **we did not meet our mid-month fundraising goal earlier this week.** This makes it significantly harder for us to ensure voters hear about how Kathy plans to fight for our jobs, healthcare, and quality education for our kids -- a message that has turned what was thought to be a long-shot race into **one of the closest House races in the country.** Now, we need to work hard and make up the difference during the second half of the month -- and we need your help to get us back on track. [**Will you contribute $5 or $10 to help Kathy 's message continue to be heard throughout the district?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542781d/e3b7d3/5c6a0e7b/2555eacf/1315536360/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180716?refcode=kme180716_m&recurring=true") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542781d/e3b7d3/5c6a0e7b/2555eacf/1315536360/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180716?refcode=kme180716_m&recurring=true")
---
Kathy and our entire team truly appreciate all of your help. Together, we'll win this.
Thank you,
Hailey
Hailey Barringer
Communications Director
Kathy Manning for Congress

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). name: Leah Vukmir
subject: NRA Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take......

Friend,

Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take action to secure themselves, their property, and their loved ones.

I know how important the Second Amendment is for Wisconsinites, which is why I am – and always have been – 100-percent pro-gun. You can trust me to fight for you because of my proven track record.

In fact, I just received word that the National Rifle Association (NRA) is giving me an “A+” rating and is only endorsing my campaign in the Wisconsin Republican primary for U.S. Senate.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrC6umn9JUJVWgNrRUNvhL5GrlEauEBcR7B1oHpFeDnQw4AXNwxe-umU1JP5wd4eKjfgD4L9UCvSFIONc_1YjEqJ6AamXOEG8w_kM8l-_RgZXThnC4e45QyebGuFqCZjym-cS_yuXOlg6V4SUm2rcEUkXSsFJhAs1MDyz1fEkLPzvqaM0I3k2ScjJb6w_wJvxv9ZcXprgNSU1qjWoO7GBvkJlAZW75uhwFM2XaEeK71vjZOBSb-FzG3lE8uGNI-7oy6Hhya4kngxTdZLsQysu6aNY0M-FeTS292GMNj5hhpsI-mLZ2RP6AXyvHoS4bjgxgcJbAMg2kOPkRZ7rHx-uUfyck3PrgHfDZYehNWQsnoVSVW-W_ogRFO3ZPbWsxQ1T8v26wYPcM2jJ0f62FMGszAo%3D)

Friend, Tammy Baldwin and her far-left supporters want to rewrite our laws to disarm law-abiding citizens, leaving everyone defenseless – except for criminals who don’t follow laws in the first place.

The safety of our schools, homes, and communities depends on fighting for our Second Amendment rights – and I’m a fighter. I won’t let Tammy’s liberal supporters take away our rights.

[Protect the 2nd Amendment: Stand with Leah](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrC6umn9JUJVWgNrRUNvhL5GrlEauEBcR7B1oHpFeDnQw4AXNwxe-umU1JP5wd4eKjfgD4L9UCvSFIONc_1YjEqJ6AamXOEG8w_kM8l-_RgZXThnC4e45QyebGuFqCZjym-cS_yuXOlg6V4SUm2rcEUkXSsFJhAs1MDyz1fEkLPzvUGWhdSDt3oBcwxr0XgBYIdXe0dFFtCQjMiYyyPjYWa5MWsnLDywa6p1v22lOoIEPZAoP_MggL2vvWJ1MP-mjUSZHnC6NxF0tZItnboGMXKHA4hrKlQGL6a7k52P1w6kwAs6udsU4RebcPw-zp66AEwSTmudAvYPv_x7maFCZy3_JN49oY5Y-YhMsnxrDx-s86RhuVPVXa74iHCvfre28VzD2DN8B_dklNpV-XN3NKhA%3D)
---

I’m happy to have the NRA on board. **[I hope you will join them and show me your support.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrC6umn9JUJVWgNrRUNvhL5GrlEauEBcR7B1oHpFeDnQw4AXNwxe-umU1JP5wd4eKjfgD4L9UCvSFIONc_1YjEqJ6AamXOEG8w_kM8l-_RgZXThnC4e45QyebGuFqCZjym-cS_yuXOlg6V4SUm2rcEUkXSsFJhAs1MDyz1fEkLPzv5xOlntEzdpKOw82Jil-34z9nZatwfIw30DZNW6azJPp1Mcq32iWtOihqRSvkru-6RaOuqkLe_4_7bLaOgFWzGIGmZ2c_1lf3-XGqdqEBloRcSVh7JTh122uQL3j1nZAL6LBxP8MWHWUpd4IrYzeJ_Is_Z_jR9jeWnQgb-w2GlqB6ioa4oHtGBmCeWsBAE1BGNu6mF-SolhbgZK7xQnAoP-SzDI8v02MOTqFr78M6_E0%3D)**

-Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrBfbjnHSmF39oyOiMC7Y9fRQQxQyPzugq1HtONmoUalBXrKHMZXkAFiNWRpnfhsXVUIHZI2mfbnVyDdelNkKORxTUJlC2OJuiT2KDRZ-bFf7o4gSA-TPam08BE2atMR8fFfLu2UODHsDANFoWRONLL2IuYpZ19Hu6fYJ3XhHZaF3lWK97TBfnoMefiR0yeJdeitk8bxRHWfsnJ_Me0AOQ9laiDsl0K_7rcrSpKDyfFvSd2_baJOR-L8OCD8ECQpNTg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrASutZDrT7_xksT00HwhpKqbTq4aXaZJAYkndFCxDdfLjrlHw0zz63pABIidUAuRPtHxP7ehRdiOeP8TY2rlu-1SrnpQzdLTVO44-aL8njbtuhGClgZIdDXDbiegONy-AEocV5QcymHgvYq9Am9pfal1AW0WA_V9WNRPzbVi9S7kiO-sgVy60bFbYhM-Kp1Wj9tP4Mefl6yBWiitqgz1XC7MmOnUKU4C5ScmyqzrQCX291P7N1MQPX7U8NdvHNimog%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=_A6avxtzo6jYNfKvqomWpihpw2DWsLTrqN4K1IOTEkuMwyziI4Mtyc2U8C6jiUhFedZtnAejNgJY0Yf3ff4Sc2FFAjjY8AOHmQTdB-gkVMlI_Nao5dOi9x8Hjx3Y8Obdr0cwUslf4SjuXW_X2BYO8CST2Jnsv7scNx2awGNL-dXdK2VJgt1edQbFiT4Bc7exyq-VmYGmH0OjeFU2-kFlxVHbDUBPXhO5HZJ7Jj-u9ME47RyRIIY-kqM3Zy65C0I3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrIEMPaBFXj6gi2v4DfDpsr2enHs7BodJ_pBvp9GoENyAT_7js2RfmydhfiXQZAXwSJvG0hzrAwRG7zQMSS9vejHPnbhd7FpguZKsIO69hfT-JqyW2Ltfb1QEXjE_IUjfQGMpln0VzhfXyYkUMKXKvnGJTnCogFLWV5_WJLmWdlaVrlFGNn7m5rjxMPaPPvWUboOcI5rEW5sWaAiFY_YNiuvhQgdAG8uhQZ4k1ogtu4tj9kkVbQaXsBkqgQhutweISDFqcFzJp4IcVU8jHsr03GLPuf-Uqu0zNb8G2GPHlM3RNtgbpi9sLeOTvYdmYOaIiuLelNKX2oBkE4b9llNZ6AmA0O-hJSvBKMV1J91aAd0O) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrIEMPaBFXj6gi2v4DfDpsr3DIv4HNDmtrJhLbxbOo4ulBclXIRWk7NbAPBV4k05FPP1kvjpW7Vo4EnzHp_SiDS6Jz8hfZpDm8aVgC3Hf6RY1H7yDOkZlVN_mJ-hSi6GD4CEl9zxQ8uyAvUhtkc2kxMy_8H_kLEWfComOOAaEBxZYpyxXglm2QRKjZnxqbVlVIvn7IUnD1Q7pV1yHEODsBjW2hNeNg_yS-DtE-QYJmJxbljNadBw__jrsFLJ-JAwcqHsQK64FVARXVmOaNYVqUNVgFPY_vZtYXS8DMnXfeZDeozBAR7HVVV1gJEqIZZxmdqqd4NV_Ac6FOVUL2SZwcMa87Qu4_qBqJtxbbOkWjAc9) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrBfbjnHSmF39oyOiMC7Y9fRQQxQyPzugq1HtONmoUalBN31kIyTbPwTxD9hiSfIN1YnnMWtr77pi1CVO4XrYfbw9_IZcWYVEsTr1khio1KrNGk88hIxnDTO6drANKCmjm35DNcCBL5--cp5xOwKOnC6fTJcGggjkCOWqN_GQtAKo6RMMkVX8lwN-1R5GqzhixPnhnqc7P4uhPdXNATn20lw8oP8w67wAlkgY4LOrfmaacZ_87SxqObeUx75imPKS_Q%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrASutZDrT7_xksT00HwhpKqbTq4aXaZJAYkndFCxDdfLIIXyA0kdWb8JrPaqRc5yLuVfPqjzowcXedH93FRTIrfDAgSrSQM-iF0qw0bNhsihx50BEyQ7-E7eCWY2w_-FZu9Pp6ZG4x-yffXX9gH5qKeU7UcxIsLKe1KiH8SRVUEakYL6_beOif-pL8cru5L5xKAZXqg54AbJ5Ol8yPFJli67u5l7rNNNw9q17-iVKsbZjyU1NN2QaMymD5tnyYRmhg%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=1ba8469d39cd4a93a177a23cecf57496&_e=Xt_tzMQti0Kcl_ooCKFKrBh8iSsRoOWxX-UL0NrUigaSQIQHnl-GhKaOjMuPjqfTVFLTq18kcMhRcXaTQRCxS6K-cR5HCpvSaeGI8oDdpZ5f9D8XiaDXKhYSbQcaWg8c3Tu-BWQlIASlUyBQwVNXwoQ51I4_6sI0yFll05Fu5w6NkfJXeKMyfEQc5SxHsL7sset5fdhEF2ALvtcOqIcYkoiM_5wocuAAnvT6twnBcSSI31p0HdeCipazp_xMqk25dF-1Kqzy8rPViDXsmI4_mQ%3D%3D) feed. clean_body: Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take...... Friend, Our Second Amendment is one of the most important protections protected by our Constitution. The right to bear arms empowers Americans to take action to secure themselves, their property, and their loved ones. I know how important the Second Amendment is for Wisconsinites, which is why I am – and always have been – 100-percent pro-gun. You can trust me to fight for you because of my proven track record. In fact, I just received word that the National Rifle Association (NRA) is giving me an “A+” rating and is only endorsing my campaign in the Wisconsin Republican primary for U.S. Senate. Friend, Tammy Baldwin and her far-left supporters want to rewrite our laws to disarm law-abiding citizens, leaving everyone defenseless – except for criminals who don’t follow laws in the first place. The safety of our schools, homes, and communities depends on fighting for our Second Amendment rights – and I’m a fighter. I won’t let Tammy’s liberal supporters take away our rights. I’m happy to have the NRA on board. -Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Team Lipinski
subject: Trump-Putin Summit: grade it right here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress |
body:
Peter,

President Trump’s summit with Russian President Putin, and
the press conference that followed, were nothing short of an
international disgrace. Nothing should ever come before our
national security or the integrity of our democracy, but Trump
dismissed facts while embracing the views of our genuine foe,
Putin’s Russia.

We were stunned by Trump’s decision to throw our country and
our intelligence community under the bus and take Putin’s word
over all the evidence we’ve seen of a premeditated Russian attack
on our democracy.

We cannot let Trump walk away thinking it’s OK for the
president to undermine our own intelligence agencies.

Please take a moment to record your GRADE of Trump’s summit
below. Our goal is to record 2,500 responses to decide Team
Lipinski’s official grade before noon tomorrow:

What grade do YOU give Trump’s summit with Putin?

name: Russia Alert via Thompson HQ
subject: our country is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress |
body:
Peter,

Did you hear the news? Special counsel Robert Mueller
recently indicted 12 Russian nationals for interfering in the
2016 election -- and what did President Trump do? Nothing.

President Trump refuses to acknowledge the fact that the
Russians actively interfered in our elections. We deserve a
leader who recognizes when our country is under attack.

Peter, let us know.

Do you believe the American people deserve truth and
transparency about Russian interference in our elections?

subject: the Koch brothers are still at it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6096/51dbcc2a/1afaac7b/3a7e90f/401474390/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Here's what's happening, team:

This race is shaping up to be a choice between a Senator who puts ordinary people before corporations and a candidate who always puts corporations first.

Bob has fought the corporations trying to repeal the Affordable Care Act, advocates for programs that help working families and seniors and has been endorsed by End Citizens United. He made waves this month when he slammed the president's decision to outsource his Supreme Court nomination to far-right, corporate special interests. Bob is in middle-class Pennsylvanians' corner.

**_[We need to send Bob back to the Senate so he can keep fighting for working Americans -- can you donate $5 to support this campaign today?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Congressman Barletta, on the other hand, voted for a tax scheme that mostly benefits the top 1%, rubber stamps the president's pro-corporate agenda any chance he can get and attacks Bob for voting in the best interest of working Pennsylvanians. Barletta says that he's expecting tons outside money to prop up his campaign, and it's already starting. Americans for Prosperity -- an organization funded by the Koch brothers -- is running ads attacking Bob for defending the integrity of our Supreme Court. It's not the first time special interests have attacked Bob in this race, and it certainly won't be the last.

**This campaign has a great story to tell about Bob and his career of fighting for every Pennsylvanian, but getting that message in front of every Pennsylvania voter costs money. It's going to take a surge of grassroots support to counteract the Koch brothers' ads. Stand with people over corporations today -- donate to Bob's campaign.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Will you make your first donation to help out?

Will you make your first donation to help out? "" Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc. name: Peter Joffrion
subject: a note on accountability
body:
Hi there--
Yesterday, the president of the United States embarrassed our nation at the Helsinki summit.
Seventeen agencies within our intelligence community have spoken. Russia interfered in our 2016 election. Russia is not our ally. We MUST hold Russia accountable. Congress must hold Donald Trump accountable.
Our incumbent Rep. Mo Brooks won't stand up to Trump, but I will.
Time and time again, with blind partisanship, Brooks has proven he puts his own personal gain over the good of the country. In an interview with CNN, Brooks said there are simply too many personnel matters involved and he "can’t possibly keep track” of Trump’s actions. His comments show a complete failure to oversee the executive branch.
But under the Obama administration, Mo had the time to co-sponsor a resolution expressing no confidence in the Attorney General... Twice. It's time North Alabama is represented by a leader who won't be bullied or bought by special interests and corruption.
If electing a leader who will put our communities first is important to you, I need your help. If we can win this Alabama seat, we'll take back the House.
In order to beat Brooks, I need to go toe to toe with him and get our message out to voters across our district. If electing a leader who will hold our president and his administration accountable matters to you, pitch in now and donate to our efforts here in AL-05. Here's the link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1668920/8891768/172365608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGEyMDlhNC0wYjhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkKPSZtaBp6lmgWYKbWKaw3K5zMieHctvvQxfImZC3E=&refcode=20180717)**
Many thanks,
Peter

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/337575d7-fb89-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1/88a209a4-0b8a-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGEyMDlhNC0wYjhhLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nkKPSZtaBp6lmgWYKbWKaw3K5zMieHctvvQxfImZC3E=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

Steve Smith for Congress | | |

| It has been a hot summer, but what is getting really heated is this election. My motivation for this campaign is respect for you the taxpayer, in addition to job creation, which is fundamental for economic growth and long-term stability.
The Arizona primary election is coming up on August 28th and mail-in voters receive their ballots as early as August 1st.
, let me be honest with you. I need your help.
This campaign already has momentum, with endorsements from Jeff DeWit, the COO of the Trump campaign, the National Border Patrol Council, and Gun Owners of America. The NBPC has never endorsed a US House candidate in a primary until now. Senator Ted Cruz has also endorsed our campaign. However, the most sought after endorsement is your contribution and your vote.
[I know that we can win this race; however, I need your help. , will you step up today and make an online donation to the campaign? Please click here to donate anything you can afford >>>](http://email.geniusmailer.com/ct/48444819:sWozOGGNY:m:1:2085652109:9A182A1229542533F87021CFF758109F:r)
My goal is to raise another $5,000 from online donors by the end of July 2018.
I am counting on your help.

Arizona is counting on your support, and so is our great nation.
Thank you, and God Bless.
Steve |

clean_body: Yesterday Trump stood next to Vladimir Putin and took Putin's side over America's. Instead of denouncing Russia's attack on our democracy, he went after American institutions. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" "" ""

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 Representative Anderson’s Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yesterday the world watched in shock and dismay as President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a joint press conference. The two leaders first sat down for a bilateral meeting and then delivered their public remarks live to the press. Standing next to Putin, Trump declined to side with US intelligence on Russian election interference, saying he doesn't "see any reason why" they would be responsible. He may not see it, but a majority of Congress and government officials on both sides of the aisle agree that there is sufficient evidence to conclude that Russia was involved in efforts to meddle in our election, and to influence President Trump’s decisions on appointing Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Lt. General H.R. McMasters. The statements made by our President make us look foolish and weak. Our electoral system has been exposed as damaged. Instead of speaking out against those who undermine our democracy, he tries to deny it even happened. It begs the question, is President Trump working to undermine our system of democracy? Does your current Representative value our democracy and the alliances we have worked decades to build, or does he turn a blind eye as our country loses standing and credibility around the world? I value our democracy. My opponent touts support for the President in his campaign without regard for the people of this district. Does he value President Trump’s opinion over that of the rest of America? Does it mean he’s with Trump and not with all of us here in Mississippi? Is he FOR the protection of our democratic process or he AGAINST it? I am for the protection of our democracy. I am for protecting the value of each and every voter, regardless of how they vote. I am for and stand with the people of South Mississippi. clean_body: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 Representative Anderson's Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yesterday the wor | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE July 17, 2018 Representative Anderson’s Statement Regarding the Trump/Putin Summit in Helsinki Yesterday the world watched in shock and dismay as President Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin held a joint press conference. The two leaders first sat down for a bilateral meeting and then delivered their public remarks live to the press. Standing next to Putin, Trump declined to side with US intelligence on Russian election interference, saying he doesn't "see any reason why" they would be responsible. He may not see it, but a majority of Congress and government officials on both sides of the aisle agree that there is sufficient evidence to conclude that Russia was involved in efforts to meddle in our election, and to influence President Trump’s decisions on appointing Secretary of State Mike Pompeo and Lt. General H.R. McMasters. The statements made by our President make us look foolish and weak. Our electoral system has been exposed as damaged. Instead of speaking out against those who undermine our democracy, he tries to deny it even happened. It begs the question, is President Trump working to undermine our system of democracy? Does your current Representative value our democracy and the alliances we have worked decades to build, or does he turn a blind eye as our country loses standing and credibility around the world? I value our democracy. Some are still standing behind the President and not speaking out on this attack. My opponent touts support for the President in his campaign without regard for the people of this district. Does he value President Trump’s opinion over that of the rest of America? Does it mean he’s with Trump and not with all of us here in Mississippi? Is he FOR the protection of our democratic process or he AGAINST it? I am for the protection of our democracy. I am for protecting the value of each and every voter, regardless of how they vote. I am for and stand with the people of South Mississippi. Onward to November!Jeramey Anderson for Congress | |

_From: John Kasich_
_Date: July 16, 2018_
_Subject: Personal ask_
_

_Peter - I wanted to reach out personally to ask for your help._

_Earlier today, President Trump met with Russian leader Putin in what is being resoundingly described as a foreign policy and national security disaster._

_**It's time for Republican and Democrat leaders to speak to the world with one voice: Russia is not our ally**._

_Not nearly enough Republican leaders have stood up to this president when he is wrong and I'm hopeful they can find the courage to do so today. Our national security and very way of life is being threatened._

** _Peter - so how can you help?_**

_[Support this message](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=5d1c544d69c34e488890b2a75147ac03&_e=VwFM-r83HHVawVkxV1yExk2xmGYh0-2iSPLRIurR8LQKSoFNdSr9guqZ9ZMraFRAwDlfuzlKWWrZU35ZsfW1RmA3chgQHZSSnbyzSF0CkxmDo7TphGK4rSfH_5CFB8bDh610COTI-X_Gz1kOSXvabhXdyd4hTzwY8NLiio7zzSMEfN83LTXF329kEv6P_JA2026HYjdQRim2MUCAuoq3o6Jxz3eNyMkeAZMoRW6LaqC6uBL7of0pkq5wYGWDlV6H8HoLWjositWXfEFLsu1u6g%3D%3D)._

_Thank you._

_-John_

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Can you make a $3 donation to support my re-election campaign and to help me support progressive candidates who will work with me to transform America if elected?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Our job is not just to win elections but to energize the American people and to transform our country.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
I am going to tell you something that not a lot of people in the political establishment and corporate media agree with, but most working people know with certainty. And that is this:
If Democrats want to win elections up and down the ballot in 2018, 2020 and beyond, we have to run progressive candidates like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez everywhere, even in states Donald Trump and the Republicans won in 2016.
**Because the issues Alexandria campaigned on — Medicare for all, a $15/hour living wage, free college tuition at public colleges and universities, fighting climate change and promoting racial, social and environmental justice — are not just popular in Vermont, Queens and the Bronx, they are popular everywhere. At a time of massive income and wealth inequality, and when real wages for ordinary workers continue to decline, these are the issues working families feel strongly about.**
But those candidates cannot do it alone. Not only are they taking on the Republican Party, but too often the Democratic political and financial establishment is aligned against them as well. So it is very important that they have our support.
**That is why this week, I am traveling to Kansas with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to rally in support of James Thompson’s and Brent Welder’s campaigns for Congress — two great progressive candidates who will prove our message can win anywhere.**
But we cannot stop there. I am going to spend the rest of this year campaigning not just for my re-election, but also to elect bold progressive candidates all across the country who will come to Congress ready to take on the billionaire class. I need your help to get that done:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to support my re-election campaign and to help me support progressive candidates who will work with me to transform America? I would not ask if it was not so important.](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/39?t=1&akid=47%2E150750%2EL6Efyt)**
Our job is not just to win elections but to energize the American people and to transform our country. We can do that by giving the American people candidates to vote for, not just vote against — candidates who are willing to take on the billionaire class and to fight for a government that works for all of us, and not just the privileged few.
Now maybe the financial elite in this country can’t bring themselves to support progressive campaigns like that, but as long as we do, those candidates are going to keep winning.
That is my intention. I am thankful that you are with me in that struggle.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[DONATE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/39?t=2&akid=47%2E150750%2EL6Efyt)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=47%2E150750%2EL6Efyt). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=4&akid=47%2E150750%2EL6Efyt).

name: Jenna Kruse, EMILY's List
subject: We have to elect more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c3f/24c69fd9/27f2a8eae/18826a3b/3310980464/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact&source=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact")
---

Peter,

When Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings begin, he better be ready for a fight because he'll have to face our women first.

Four EMILY's List women serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee: Ranking Member Dianne Feinstein (CA), Amy Klobuchar (MN), Mazie Hirono (HI), and Kamala Harris (CA).

But they're the only women on a committee of 21 members.

We need to add to their ranks.

**[Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c3f/24c69fd9/27f2a8eae/18826a34/3310980464/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180717_email_SJCHearings?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+prochoice+De&utm_campaign=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact&source=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact")**

Our Senate women are essential to these hearings, asking tough questions and getting the answers we deserve.

During Justice Gorsuch's hearings, Sen. Feinstein pressed the nominee about his positions on torture, surveillance, and workers' rights.

Sen. Klobuchar got Attorney General Jeff Sessions on the record saying he couldn't make "a blanket commitment" not to jail reporters for doing their jobs.

Sen. Hirono vowed to ask every single judicial nominee if they have a history of sexual assault or harassment.

And Sen. Harris uses her background as a prosecutor to ask pointed questions that nominees can't avoid.

All four of these women are the first line of defense against this anti-choice Supreme Court nominee.

We need more leaders like them in the Senate.

**Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate to hold Republican appointees accountable:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hold-GOP-Nominees-Accountable](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4c3f/24c69fd9/27f2a8eae/18826a35/3310980464/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180717_email_SJCHearings?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHoldGOPNomineesA&utm_campaign=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact&source=WQEFES42N_digital_email_20180717_SJCHearings_inact")**

Thanks,

clean_body: We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | "" Peter, When Supreme Court nominee Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation hearings begin, he better be ready for a fight because he'll have to face our women first. Four EMILY's List women serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee: Ranking Member Dianne Feinstein (CA), Amy Klobuchar (MN), Mazie Hirono (HI), and Kamala Harris (CA). But they're the only women on a committee of 21 members. We need to add to their ranks. "" Our Senate women are essential to these hearings, asking tough questions and getting the answers we deserve. During Justice Gorsuch's hearings, Sen. Feinstein pressed the nominee about his positions on torture, surveillance, and workers' rights. Sen. Klobuchar got Attorney General Jeff Sessions on the record saying he couldn't make "a blanket commitment" not to jail reporters for doing their jobs. Sen. Hirono vowed to ask every single judicial nominee if they have a history of sexual assault or harassment. And Sen. Harris uses her background as a prosecutor to ask pointed questions that nominees can't avoid. All four of these women are the first line of defense against this anti-choice Supreme Court nominee. We need more leaders like them in the Senate. Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate to hold Republican appointees accountable: "" Thanks, Jenna Kruse Vice President of Research, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. name: Paul Davis
subject: We cannot remain silent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueAv2zrzaxXIYVHnnfR_4JpxvaKxld6TE-W8sb2h-bI=/-ZSrypteE3gAmRe-bchKqdKOY7Ng7-Hp3qnRMIqgR_4=?gpsid=13_36_2110&ms=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&refcode=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

Yesterday at a summit in Helsinki, Finland, President Donald Trump made alarming comments that discredited the United States intelligence community while siding with Russian President Vladimir Putin.

There's no question Russia's interference in the last election was an unprecedented attack on our freedom and our democracy. Yet, despite overwhelming evidence, the only American official who will not defend America against one of our most dangerous adversaries is our Commander in Chief.

**[We cannot sit by and allow President Trump to continue to do nothing. Add your name now and join me in condemning President Trump's alliance with Russia.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueAv2zrzaxXIYVHnnfR_4JpxvaKxld6TE-W8sb2h-bI=/-ZSrypteE3gAmRe-bchKqdKOY7Ng7-Hp3qnRMIqgR_4=?gpsid=13_36_2110&ms=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&refcode=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Kansans want leaders who will work with President Trump when it makes sense for Kansas but will stand up to our president when his actions hurt our state and our nation. But right now, the silence from the Republican field on this matter is not only offensive and disappointing, but it sets a very dangerous precedent for the type of representation they would offer Kansas.

**[We cannot remain silent any longer. Add your name next to mine and condemn President Trump's inaction.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueAv2zrzaxXIYVHnnfR_4JpxvaKxld6TE-W8sb2h-bI=/-ZSrypteE3gAmRe-bchKqdKOY7Ng7-Hp3qnRMIqgR_4=?gpsid=13_36_2110&ms=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&refcode=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul Davis

Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
---

Paul Davis for Congress
PO Box 944
Lawrence KS 66044 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ueAv2zrzaxXIYVHnnfR_4JpxvaKxld6TE-W8sb2h-bI=/W6Fg48smo9iLfT3NZknctxMk8pnhSTG93uvSSatq8B8=).

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: This is the last thing we needed to hear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|

| | | The team and I are nervous about this headline.

_" RNC fights blue wave by already contacting 20 million voters" \- NBC News_

This is the _last thing_ we needed to hear after the Koch brothers have already started running digital ads against me.

**_[We must power a massive groundswell of Democratic action to fight back. Help me raise another $15,000 in the next 48 hours so we can keep our blue wave surging forward->](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+We+must+power+a+massive+groundswell+of+D&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1")_**

National Republicans have already spoken to over 20 million voters on the phone or at their homes. **If you include digital actions and direct mail contacts, they 've made nearly 500 million voter contacts.**
**[STOP THE GOP>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-july-midmonth-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+STOP+THE+GOP+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180717_1_1")** As Democrats, we pride ourselves on our grassroots organizing. But now Republicans and the Koch brothers are getting in the game, and it's clear they are willing to spend whatever it takes to defend their Senate and House majorities.

**_[That is why I need your help immediately. We need to raise another $15,000 in the next 48 hours to stay on track for our mid-month budget goals. We can't afford to miss these projections and fall behind to the Republican outreach machine.](http://nm.martinheinrich. name: Bob Casey
subject: 15 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6098/51dbcc2a/1af87d21/3a7e101/118468267/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
Election Day is 15 weeks away, it'll be here before we know it.

Before Pennsylvanians head to the polls, we need to expand our organizing program, put more ads on the air and send campaign supplies to offices across the state. There's a lot of work left to be done and a limited amount of time to do it.

**My campaign is going to be making some important strategic decisions next week, and many of those decisions will depend on how much money is in the bank. Can you chip in to show your support?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr2_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr2_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr2_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr2_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The stakes in this race couldn't be higher -- now that there's a Supreme Court vacancy, Republicans are more motivated to go after Democratic Senators up for re-election. I will not support a far-right, corporate-backed nominee, and Republicans are already buying ads to attack me for that. Voting rights, workers' rights, LGBT rights, the Affordable Care Act -- there's so much on the line. We need to rally around every single Senator who can ensure that the next Supreme Court justice will put the Constitution and the American people before corporate special interests.

**I can handle months of attacks, no problem, but my campaign needs to be able to answer them. We need ads and organizers to make sure voters know that I'm fighting for them. Can you donate $5 to make that happen?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/fight-back](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180717_fr2_s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Bob Menendez
subject: This is absolutely astonishing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

I never believed that I would witness a sitting president of the United States stand on a stage alongside a ruthless dictator and listen to them both condemn our country and its citizens.

Trump's actions in Helsinki should be a wake-up call to even the most steadfast supporters of the president - the actions and words Trump used are nothing short of appalling and undermine our citizens, ideals, values, and the entire western world.

This was a slap in the face to every American citizen and must be condemned in the highest fashion.

[**I 'm calling on my Republican colleagues in the Senate to denounce Trump's actions and take serious steps to stop Russia and President Putin's continued efforts to undermine American democracy. If you're with me, add your name today >>>**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c95/3af3c5d/3b87f44b/4ec38bf5/2651524215/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/RussiaPetition?gpsid=5_73_2104&source=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+calling+on+my+Republican+colleag")

The incoherent and appallingly self-serving circus in Helsinki was as predictable as it was avoidable. President Trump rejected his solemn duty to uphold and defend American values, ideals, and citizens, calling the US "foolish" and praising Putin's denial of election meddling as "strong and powerful."

In response to this unprecedented failure in presidential leadership, Bob Hugin issued a half-hearted statement, only calling Trump's statement "distressing." We must not forget that Hugin donated over $100,000 to elect a president who has actively sided with Russia over America.

It's time to stand up to Trump and condemn his choice to side with a foe determined to challenge American power, influence, and security interests at home and abroad.

[**Add your name and demand Senate Republicans stand up for America and put our needs before our enemies.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c95/3af3c5d/3b87f44b/4ec38bf4/2651524215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/RussiaPetition?gpsid=5_73_2104&source=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180717_Russia_engg_gq_cust__BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+demand+Senate+Republic")

Thank you,

Bob

| Paid for by Menendez for Senate

clean_body: Friend, I never believed that I would witness a sitting president of the United States stand on a stage alongside a ruthless dictator and listen to them both condemn our country and its citizens. Trump's actions in Helsinki should be a wake-up call to even the most steadfast supporters of the president - the actions and words Trump used are nothing short of appalling and undermine our citizens, ideals, values, and the entire western world. This was a slap in the face to every American citizen and must be condemned in the highest fashion. "" The incoherent and appallingly self-serving circus in Helsinki was as predictable as it was avoidable. President Trump rejected his solemn duty to uphold and defend American values, ideals, and citizens, calling the US "foolish" and praising Putin's denial of election meddling as "strong and powerful." In response to this unprecedented failure in presidential leadership, Bob Hugin issued a half-hearted statement, only calling Trump's statement "distressing." We must not forget that Hugin donated over $100,000 to elect a president who has actively sided with Russia over America. It's time to stand up to Trump and condemn his choice to side with a foe determined to challenge American power, influence, and security interests at home and abroad. "" Thank you, Bob | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

name: Team Inslee
subject: We're #1!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Washington's economy was just ranked #1 of all 50 states!

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78960/2f5ea88d/77ae6f4c/2cbc0e79/2153378518/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-economy?utm_source=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&refcode=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&utm_campaign=progressive-economy&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Some good news: _Business Insider_ recently ranked the economies of all the states, and you guessed it: **Of all 50 states, Washington is #1 (again)!** We have once again proven that progressive policies actually help the economy, not hurt it -- as Republicans want America to believe. [**Governor Inslee is leading the charge to model and support progressive legislation for the states, and Washington state is proof positive that we need to keep fighting for progressive policies across the country. Will you chip in now as we fight for a progressive agenda and to dispel the Republican myth?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78960/2f5ea88d/77ae6f4c/2cbc0e79/2153378518/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-economy?utm_source=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&refcode=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&utm_campaign=progressive-economy&utm_medium=ema") The _Business Insider_ article lauded our progress in the past year: Washington has the second-highest average weekly wage among the 50 states and DC at $1,168 per week! And we keep producing more jobs: Our job growth rate last year was 2.8%, the fourth-highest in the country. That's what investing in people, clean energy, and infrastructure can do: We see a huge boost in jobs for everyone. We couldn't have done this without you, friend, and the rest of our progressive supporters! Because of you, we've been able to push progressive policies that have boosted Washington's economy to the best of the 50 states. That's what's kept us at #1 for the past two years! We've blown up the Republican myth here in Washington. We've shown what happens when you invest in education, invest in infrastructure, and invest in workers by raising the minimum wage, providing paid sick leave, and crafting the best paid family leave policy in the nation -- you get the best economy in the nation. [**Now, before midnight on Ju ly 18, will you help Governor Inslee keep pushing for progress here at home, and show our neighbors how to make their dreams a reality?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78960/2f5ea88d/77ae6f4c/2cbc0e79/2153378518/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-economy?utm_source=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&refcode=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&utm_campaign=progressive-economy&utm_medium=ema") Thanks for making us the best state in the Union! Best, Team Inslee | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78960/2f5ea88d/77ae6f4c/2cbc0e79/2153378518/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-economy?utm_source=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&refcode=ema_2018-07-17_progressive-economy&utm_campaign=progressive-economy&utm_medium=ema")

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: 100% people, no corporations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Not only did we hit our 10,000 individual donation goal, we blew past it for an astounding 10,836 contributions.
#

Peter -
First and foremost, I want to thank you for supporting us. Last night, every campaign had to report its fundraising numbers, and because of people like, we broke fundraising records.
Not only did we hit our 10,000 individual donation goal, we blew past it for an astounding 10,836 contributions. That's **more than double any previous candidate for New York Attorney General** has ever received in for a single campaign, and we did it before the first deadline.
**And out of all of those record-breaking contributions, not one came from a corporate PAC or an LLC. I am very proud of that fact.**
But we can't stop now. The political establishment's and Wall Street's hand-picked candidates are funding their campaigns by taking massive sums of money from PACs, LLCs, and some of the richest people in New York. And because of that, they actually raised more money than we did.
What yesterday's campaign finance reports proved is that we are the grassroots campaign to beat. And if we continue to stand together, we are going to win:
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? Your support will let us continue building our grassroots movement, and if we keep this going, we are going to win.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea9/6e822e2f/1b9edfe7/41727452/3947206786/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180717-full")**
Peter, we're doing things differently on this campaign, and it's working. We are building a movement that can beat the political and financial establishment's hand-picked candidates, and when we do, the people can have faith that our Attorney General is completely independent.
Thank you for powering this movement.
All my best,
Zephyr Teachout
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780ea9/6e822e2f/1b9edfe7/41727452/3947206786/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTctZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180717-full")**

name: Martha Roby for Congress
subject: Roby Statement on Republican Runoff Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Martha Roby for Congress
body:
| | | | [View in browser](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=123A143A9A3833)

---
| | [](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=123A143A9A3834)
---
| | For Immediate Release: Tuesday, July 17, 2018
Contact: [Emily Taylor Johnson](mailto:emily@martharoby.com), 334.717.0461
Roby Statement on Republican Runoff Victory
MONTGOMERY, AL -- U.S. Representative Martha Roby (R-AL) tonight released the following statement regarding her victory in the Republican Primary Runoff Election in Alabama’s Second Congressional District:

"I’m honored and humbled that the people of Alabama’s Second District have again placed their trust and confidence in me, and that I will have the opportunity to continue to do this job on their behalf. On behalf of my family and me, thank you to each person who went out to the polls today to support me.

"Over the past several months, Team Roby traveled up and down our district to touch as many voters as we possibly could to remind them why I believe I am best positioned to continue to fight for the conservative values we all hold dear. To all of the people who took the time to talk with me and my team on your doorstep, on your porch, while driving down the road, or enjoying a meal -- please know how much the time you spent with us means to our campaign. We didn’t take one vote for granted, and I truly valued visiting with so many great people on the campaign trail.
"Over the last year and a half, it’s been a great privilege to be a part of the conservative momentum and to work alongside my colleagues in Congress and the Trump Administration to push some very important priorities over the finish line. We are in a unique position to accomplish even more, and I’m eager to continue the fight."
Representative Roby now advances as the Republican nominee in the November general election.

###

name: Kathy Manning
subject: Congressman Budd, grow a spine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Friend, Yesterday, like many of you, I was deeply concerned as I listened to the nightly news about the President's summit with Vladimir Putin. **Republicans and Democrats alike should be able to agree on one thing: Vladimir Putin and Russia are not friends of the United States.** They have never been friends of the United States. We should not be siding with a foreign adversary over our country's top intelligence and law enforcement officials. Now more than ever, we need leaders to stand up, put country before party, and do what's right for the safety and security of this country. This shouldn't be a partisan issue, but Congressman Budd continues to show a lack of backbone and unwillingness to stand up to his party. **_If North Carolina and America come first to you, Congressman Budd, then prove it._** I call on Congressman Ted Budd to grow a spine, stand up to his party, and demand this administration stop siding with foreign adversaries and stand strong against those who are trying to subvert our democracy. North Carolina doesn't need another "duck and cover" politician when things get tough. With your support, we can bring backbone back to Washington. Thanks,
Kathy | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427802/e3b7d3/5c695bf2/2555ea93/4173176869/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180717?refcode=kme180717_m&recurring=true")
