name: Kelly, Team Donnelly
subject: RE: President Trump's meeting with Putin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Joe emailed you yesterday about President Trump's meeting with President Putin. |
---

| | Peter,

Joe emailed you yesterday about President Trump's meeting with President Putin.

Joe wrote, **"I'm extremely disappointed by what happened [yesterday] in Helsinki. It was a blow to America 's national security. Now Russia may be empowered to interfere in our elections once again -- and we cannot allow that."**

Peter, I support Joe because he isn't afraid to stand up to the President when he's wrong. But there are a lot of powerful special interests in Washington who want to replace Joe with someone who will approve the President's agenda no matter what. Their pick is **Republican Rep. Mike Braun, who actually praised President Trump 's actions in Helsinki yesterday!**

Now I'm asking you to take the next step and **[support Joe's campaign.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e8f/7377f838/3d833732/51f9e621/2103547735/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/putin-meeting?refcode=20180717.1&amount=10")**

\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Joe Donnelly
Subject: President Trump's meeting with Putin
Kelly,

President Trump met with Russian President Vladimir Putin in Helsinki today -- and instead of taking Putin to task for interfering in our 2016 elections, he embraced Putin and abandoned our nation's intelligence community.

When given the chance to stand up for our security interests, President Trump denied the consensus of our intelligence community, including Director of National Intelligence and former Indiana Senator Dan Coats, that Russia attempted to influence the 2016 election. Standing next to Vladimir Putin, he blamed the United States instead.

As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I'm extremely disappointed by what happened today in Helsinki. It was a blow to America's national security. Now Russia may be empowered to interfere in our elections once again -- and we cannot allow that.

Thanks,
Joe

|

When given the chance to stand up for our security interests, President Trump denied the consensus of our intelligence community, including Director of National Intelligence and former Indiana Senator Dan Coats, that Russia attempted to influence the 2016 election. Standing next to Vladimir Putin, he blamed the United States instead. As a member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, I'm extremely disappointed by what happened today in Helsinki. It was a blow to America's national security. Now Russia may be empowered to interfere in our elections once again -- and we cannot allow that. Thanks, Joe | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

body:
Team - after Mitch McConnell admitted that the battle for the Senate majority will be fought in Nevada, he didn't wait long to try to tilt the scales for Republicans: **A McConnell-linked Super PAC announced an $11.2 million ad buy against me in an effort to keep Nevada in the GOP 's hands. [(Give right now to help us stop Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate!)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd62b/4fbb2af3/7ba8119b/5e8b1d14/3460490427/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg0NC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk844-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

**This news couldn 't have come at a worse time - because we're falling short of our fundraising goal this month, and we HAVE to raise another $15,000 before midnight.**
If we miss this goal, we could lose our chance to win in Nevada - and Democrats' best shot at taking back the Senate and protecting the future of the Supreme Court. **So I 'm counting on you to give right now:**

name: Tina Smith
subject: Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We must stand up for our democracy.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bb3e/c1f7015/6b766100/114224a0/549361088/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july-russia?refcode=rtw_20180717_em-B") Friends, We must talk honestly about what is happening between Russia and our President in this moment. Seven different federal investigating bodies and organizations -- the CIA, Office of the Director of National Intelligence, FBI, NSA, Justice Department, House Intelligence Committee, and the Senate Intelligence Committee -- have concluded that Russia interfered in our election in 2016. **Yet, we saw President Trump stand with Vladimir Putin yesterday and fail to stand up for our democracy or even utter a word in protest. We cannot be silent as our democracy is attacked and the people who did it congratulated.** **[Please make an urgent contribution now so we can win this special election and take back the Senate. Republicans have refused to put any type of meaningful check on Donald Trump's power -- that's why we must take back the Senate and do it ourselves.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bb3e/c1f7015/6b766100/114224a0/549361088/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july-russia?refcode=rtw_20180717_em-B")** This problem is not going away just because Trump ignores it. On Monday, Russian national Maria Butina, a radical pro-gun activist, was arrested and "is accused of trying to cultivate relationships with American politicians to establish 'back channel' lines of communication and seeking to infiltrate U.S. political groups." **One of these political groups was the National Rifle Association -- one of the Republican Party 's and Donald Trump's largest backers.** This comes after the earlier charges filed on Friday against 12 Russian military intelligence officers who are accused of playing a key role in the Russian interference in our election. **We have clear evidence and Trump still refuses to take action, or even to stand with our country and recognize the truth. We need a check on this President who will not stand up for our democracy.** **[Will you make a contribution now so we can take back the Senate and put a firm check on Donald Trump's power? Every contribution puts us one step closer to stopping Russia's attacks on our democracy and the President who enables them.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bb3e/c1f7015/6b766100/114224a0/549361088/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july-russia?refcode=rtw_20180717_em-B")** Thank you for standing up for our democracy, Tina | **Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets. She needs your help to hit her July goal if she is going to win this tough race.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bb3e/c1f7015/6b766100/114224a1/549361088/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july-russia?refcode=rtw_20180717_em-B-biobox")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bb3e/c1f7015/6b766100/114224a2/549361088/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). body:

Friend,

Mitch McConnell has been targeting Arizona's Senate race for months. We know from history that **McConnell is willing to use whatever dishonest and cynical tactics it takes to get his way**.

Now his handpicked candidate for Arizona's Senate seat appears to be following his lead.

It's sad that McSally is the first to go negative with her ads against us -- and given she's McConnell's chosen candidate, it's not surprising. **[But now we have to fight back.](http://act.kyrstensinema.
